title: Internet History & Culture
description: The story of the internet, from the first website to viral memes

questions.question: What year was the first website created?
questions.explanation: Tim Berners-Lee created the first website at CERN in 1991, explaining the World Wide Web.

questions.question: What was the most popular search engine before Google?
questions.explanation: Yahoo! was the dominant internet portal and search engine throughout the late 1990s.

questions.question: What year was Google founded?
questions.explanation: Google was founded by Larry Page and Sergey Brin in September 1998.

questions.question: What was the first video ever uploaded to YouTube?
questions.explanation: "Me at the zoo" was uploaded by co-founder Jawed Karim on April 23, 2005.

questions.question: Which social network was popular before Facebook among college students?
questions.explanation: MySpace was the largest social networking site from 2005 to 2008 before Facebook overtook it.

questions.question: What does 'www' stand for?
questions.explanation: WWW stands for World Wide Web, invented by Tim Berners-Lee.

questions.question: Which meme features a cat with a Pop-Tart body flying through space?
questions.explanation: Nyan Cat became a viral sensation in 2011 with its rainbow trail animation.

questions.question: What was the first major online encyclopedia anyone could edit?
questions.explanation: Wikipedia launched on January 15, 2001, and became the largest encyclopedia ever.

questions.question: Which email service did Google launch in 2004?
questions.explanation: Gmail launched on April 1, 2004, and people initially thought it was an April Fools joke.

questions.question: What does 'meme' originally refer to?
questions.explanation: Richard Dawkins coined 'meme' in 1976 to describe a unit of cultural transmission.

questions.question: Which platform was the first to use hashtags?
questions.explanation: Twitter popularized hashtags in 2007 when Chris Messina proposed using # for groups.

questions.question: What was the name of the first web browser with a graphical interface?
questions.explanation: Mosaic, released in 1993, was the first widely used graphical web browser.

questions.question: Which online marketplace was founded by Pierre Omidyar in 1995?
questions.explanation: eBay (originally AuctionWeb) was founded in 1995 as an online auction site.

questions.question: What song became the first YouTube video to reach 1 billion views?
questions.explanation: PSY's Gangnam Style was the first video to reach 1 billion views in December 2012.

questions.question: What year did Netflix start streaming movies online?
questions.explanation: Netflix introduced streaming in 2007, originally alongside its DVD rental service.
